content: The European Union is set up with the aim of ending the frequent and bloody wars between neighbours, which culminated in the Second World War.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by al_ex_an_der (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ita:L’Unione europea viene posta in essere allo scopo di mettere fine alle guerre frequenti e sanguinose tra paesi vicini, c
